mapper.sql: ID, PRJ_ID, SUBJECT, DESCRIPTION, CATEGORY_CD, STATUS_CD, PRIORITY_CD, CREATED_ON, UPDATED_ON, EST_START_DATE, DUE_DATE, START_DATE, CLOSED_DATE, PARENT_ISSUE, ROOT_ISSUE, MEM_ID, LFT, RGT, DONE_RATIO, IS_ATTACH_CD
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, PRJ_ID, SUBJECT, DESCRIPTION, get_sub_code_name(CATEGORY_CD) as CATEGORY_CD, get_sub_code_name(STATUS_CD) as STATUS_CD, get_sub_code_name(PRIORITY_CD)as PRIORITY_CD, CREATED_ON, UPDATED_ON, EST_START_DATE, DUE_DATE, START_DATE, CLOSED_DATE, PARENT_ISSUE, ROOT_ISSUE, GET_USERID_TO_NAME (MEM_ID) as memName, LFT, RGT, DONE_RATIO FROM ISSUE
ORDER BY PRIORITY_CD DESC

SELECT ID, PRJ_ID, SUBJECT, DESCRIPTION, get_sub_code_name(CATEGORY_CD) as CATEGORY_CD, get_sub_code_name(STATUS_CD) as STATUS_CD, get_sub_code_name(PRIORITY_CD)as PRIORITY_CD, CREATED_ON, UPDATED_ON, EST_START_DATE, DUE_DATE, START_DATE, CLOSED_DATE, PARENT_ISSUE, (SELECT P.SUBJECT FROM ISSUE P WHERE P.ID = ISSUE.PARENT_ISSUE) AS parentIssueSubject, ROOT_ISSUE, GET_USERID_TO_NAME (MEM_ID) as memName, LFT, RGT, DONE_RATIO FROM ISSUE WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT ID AS id, PRJ_ID AS prjId, SUBJECT AS subject, DESCRIPTION AS description, CATEGORY_CD AS categoryCd, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, PRIORITY_CD AS priorityCd, CREATED_ON AS createdOn, UPDATED_ON AS updatedOn, EST_START_DATE AS estStartDate, DUE_DATE AS dueDate, START_DATE AS startDate, CLOSED_DATE AS closedDate, PARENT_ISSUE AS parentIssue, ROOT_ISSUE AS rootIssue, MEM_ID AS memId, LFT AS lft, RGT AS rgt, DONE_RATIO AS doneRatio, IS_ATTACH_CD AS isAttachCd FROM ISSUE WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT ID, PRJ_ID, SUBJECT, DESCRIPTION, get_sub_code_name(CATEGORY_CD) as CATEGORY_CD, get_sub_code_name(STATUS_CD) as STATUS_CD, get_sub_code_name(PRIORITY_CD)as PRIORITY_CD, CREATED_ON, UPDATED_ON, EST_START_DATE, DUE_DATE, START_DATE, CLOSED_DATE, PARENT_ISSUE, ROOT_ISSUE, GET_USERID_TO_NAME (MEM_ID) as memName, LFT, RGT, DONE_RATIO FROM ISSUE WHERE PARENT_ISSUE = #{id} ORDER BY ID DESC

SELECT c.ID, c.PARENT_ID, c.ISSUE_ID, c.CONTENT, c.WRITE_DATE, GET_USERID_TO_NAME(c.MEM_ID) AS memId, LEVEL AS depth FROM issue_comment c WHERE c.issue_id = #{id} START WITH c.parent_id IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR c.id = c.parent_id ORDER SIBLINGS BY c.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO issue_comment ( id, PARENT_ID, ISSUE_ID, CONTENT, WRITE_DATE, MEM_ID ) VALUES ( ISS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{parentId}, #{issueId}, #{content}, SYSDATE, #{memId} )
